purpose: Cross-system inference scaffold for BaZi, Qi Men Dun Jia, Mei Hua Yi Shu, and Feng Shui.

layers.role: Collect the raw materials required to start a reading.
questions: What is the source input for this system?
Which inputs are required and which are optional?
What context belongs to the person, the environment, the time, or the event?

layers.role: Define the system's irreducible building blocks before interpretation begins.
questions: What are the base symbols, categories, and transformations?
Which concepts are considered foundational and repeated?
What definitions must be stable across all later inference?

layers.role: Identify the dominant arrangement, pattern, or battlefield of forces.
questions: What is the main structure or configuration here?
Which forces are primary, secondary, or interfering?
Is the structure clean, mixed, broken, hidden, or conditional?

layers.role: Fix the order of reasoning so the system does not jump straight to conclusions.
questions: What must be checked first, second, and third?
What is the default mainline of reasoning?
Which steps are mandatory before a conclusion can be trusted?

layers.role: Record the conditions that change the reasoning path.
questions: What conditions cause the analysis to switch tracks?
Which signals downgrade or invalidate a conclusion?
What counts as a high-confidence path versus a fallback path?

layers.role: Translate the structure into a concrete topic domain.
questions: Which life topic is being read?
How does the same structure land differently across health, relationship, career, timing, or space?
What topic-specific conditions must be checked before output?

layers.role: Convert internal inference into product-safe user language.
questions: What should stay internal and never be exposed?
How should certainty, risk, and opportunity be phrased?
What tone rules or safety policies apply?

product_rule: Never expose raw metaphysical mechanics by default.
Turn deterministic claims into directional advice.
Separate internal confidence from user-facing tone.

core_engine_principles: Do not jump from a symbol directly to an outcome.
Always identify the main structure before topic interpretation.
Repeated concepts should be treated as foundational or core emphasis, not as noise.
Each conclusion should be traceable to a reasoning path, not only a matched keyword.
Different metaphysical systems may use different symbols, but they can share the same inference architecture.

shared_reasoning_nodes.description: Separate the long-term dominant structure from local noise, side channels, and temporary branches before making topic conclusions.
Check whether a pattern is genuinely established before applying its dedicated method; if not, fall back to a more basic analysis path.
Distinguish between resources that are visible, reachable, shareable, or truly controlled by the subject.
Judge whether the action reached the real target, whether it completed the loop, and whether it should be treated as high, medium, or low effectiveness.
Separate long-cycle scheduling from short-cycle triggering so stage background and event trigger are not confused.
Check whether a signal has real backing, where it comes from, and whether it is truly callable or only superficially visible.
Separate what belongs to the subject's controllable inner domain from what remains external, visible, or only partially reachable.
Distinguish whether the core self is being damaged or only the external function/resource line is impaired before landing on topic conclusions.

bazi_core_paths.name: framework_to_topic
steps: Set the spatial and relational framework.
Identify the dominant structure and force direction.
Check whether the structure is formed, completed, and efficient.
Only then land the reading into a concrete topic.

bazi_core_paths.name: geju_vs_tiyong_switch
steps: Check whether the month commander already gives a clear pattern entry.
If formed, use pattern analysis first.
If not formed, fall back to body-use and force-flow analysis.

bazi_core_paths.name: timing_path
steps: List the possible mainlines in the natal chart.
Use long-cycle luck to determine which line is on stage.
Use annual trigger attribution to decide what manifests concretely and who initiates.

bazi_core_paths.name: ownership_and_body_damage_path
steps: Determine whether the relevant signal is in the inner domain or remains external.
Check whether it is rooted and truly callable.
Distinguish body damage from use/resource damage before landing on health, relationship, or wealth conclusions.

implementation_targets: Use this file as the meta-layer above teacher-rule-library.json.
Add reasoning-path fields to future rule extraction work.
When building prompts, pass both matched rules and the inferred path order.
Reuse shared reasoning nodes across BaZi, Qi Men, Mei Hua, and Feng Shui instead of rewriting the same decision logic with new symbols.
Use root/source, internal/external domain, and body-vs-use damage as reusable decision nodes when matching topic-specific rules.
